disclaimer: User activity log entries are operational provenance records — a user activity event does not modify candidate scores or pathway routing, does not authorize external submission, and does not constitute a detection claim.

entries.notes: Successful login from authorized workstation; session token issued.
Scoring threshold updated by authorized operator; change logged for audit trail.
Data export completed but destination path had limited free space; operator notified.
API call to external catalog failed due to authentication error; credentials may be expired.
Privilege escalation attempt blocked; operator does not have admin rights for this resource.
